example: The two sides went at each other during the debate.
She decided to go after her dream despite the difficulties.
Please go through your essay before handing it in.

meaning: v. 四处走动；日常活动
example: She went about her daily work as usual.
He finally got over his fear of failure.
The meeting was put over until next week.
He felt at one with nature during the hike.
I happened to meet my old friend yesterday.
He put forward a practical solution to the problem.
She put in a lot of effort to improve her English.
We should cut back on unnecessary spending.
We should cut down on plastic use.

meaning: v. 开始出现（通常是不好的情况）
example: Fear began to set in after the accident.
Try to set aside some time for reading every day.

meaning: v. 暂时放下（分歧、情绪）
example: We should set aside our differences.
She set about preparing for the final exam.
The bike was almost run over by a car.
She went up to the teacher after class.
Put on your coat before going outside.
The issue gave rise to heated discussion.
